pi_items.verified_value: EPSG:32734 is WGS 84 / UTM zone 34S; however, the actual source SRTM data file (srtm_41_19.tif) is in EPSG:32733 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 33S)
pi_items.source: Downloaded and analyzed srtm_41_19.tif from https://github.com/qgis/QGIS-Training-Data/raw/master/exercise_data/raster/SRTM/srtm_41_19.tif; GeoKeyDirectory tag 3072 shows ProjectedCSTypeGeoKey value of 32733; pyproj conversion confirms coordinates convert to -33.7834°, 20.0686° (0.44° from Swellendam at -34.0226°, 20.4417°) when interpreted as zone 33S

pi_items.verified_value: 10 meters is reasonable for fire lookout tower observer height
pi_items.source: Fire lookout tower research shows typical tower heights of 30-120 feet (9-37 meters); 10 meters falls within this range as observer eye level from tower platform

pi_items.verified_value: 20 km (20000 meters) is a documented typical viewshed radius for fire detection
pi_items.source: Research on fire watchtower visibility analysis shows: towers can monitor 15 km diameter (7.5 km radius) without binoculars and 20 km with binoculars; image-based systems show poor performance at 10-20 km range

pi_items.verified_value: Real SRTM data available from QGIS training repository (837x661 pixels, int16, 1,108,202 bytes, elevation range 0-1699m covering Swellendam area)
pi_items.source: Successfully downloaded from https://github.com/qgis/QGIS-Training-Data/raw/master/exercise_data/raster/SRTM/srtm_41_19.tif; file is valid GeoTIFF with realistic elevation statistics for Western Cape region
This is a task-specific threshold parameter; cannot be verified against external data sources

privileged_info_summary: The SRTM DEM file (srtm_41_19.tif) is real data from the QGIS training repository covering the Swellendam area in Western Cape, South Africa, with elevation range 0-1699m. The task metadata correctly identifies the target CRS as EPSG:32734 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 34S), which is appropriate for this region; however, the actual source SRTM data file is encoded in EPSG:32733 (UTM zone 33S), requiring reprojection as specified in the task. The observer height of 10 meters and analysis radius of 20 kilometers are both reasonable values for fire lookout tower viewshed analysis based on established fire detection practices.
